h16e3909cgb046g454dg8ad7g61fe28838c43: The Emerald Enclave was destined for ruin with Kagha in charge. A shame so much blood was shed.
hd35bd7a1gdbd8g482fg892cgd4ab41426b26: It's a wonder the rest took up arms for her. I'd expect more resistance.
h4ae9087ag5677g49abg8af2gf4c894842157: The druids felt threatened. I might have done the same.
h21e5c86cgf94bg4b64g9565g415ad3dc9191: Threatened by harmless refugees seeking shelter - all while a goblin horde nipped at their heels?
hf2acb03fg0af7g411cg81dcg55f173835e22: Yes, they felt threatened. You should give more thought as to why.
h48bf8d2fg6efbg4a47g8f91ge26b2280b0df: These deaths were preventable. We should be careful about making enemies.
ha10f5c20g249ag48f6g9135g0795a3e10181: They turned their backs on the needy. I can conjure only so much pity.
h9fce33eaga03eg4944g829agb7728c535bcb: The Blade seeks justice above all. Act like a monster? I'll treat you like one.
hf5566e40g556dg41f2gbe59g1a274674f5a2: The sheep trotted willingly to their slaughter. I won't mourn for them.
h8beda74cg2875g452ag9df9gebf3f5fe2cf6: Even sheep gather courage when the shepherd falls.
hc89ea1fcgca17g4ac1gbf1fgf9591f660857: More might have rebelled. They chose not to - and met their deaths for it.
